resultTitle.en: This looks like a misleading product information issue.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 这看起来像是商品信息误导的问题。

resultSummary.en: The product or service may not match what was promised, shown, or labelled.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 商品或服务可能与承诺、展示或标签描述不一致。

summary.en: Compare what was shown or promised with what you actually received
summary.zh-Hans: 对比展示或承诺内容与实际收到的商品

text.en: Compare what was shown or promised with what you actually received.
text.zh-Hans: 把展示或承诺的内容，与您实际收到的商品或服务进行对比。

summary.en: Take clear photos of the product and anything misleading
summary.zh-Hans: 拍下商品及误导性内容的清晰照片

text.en: Take clear photos of the product, label, packaging, and anything that seems misleading.
text.zh-Hans: 拍下商品、标签、包装，以及任何看起来具有误导性的内容。

summary.en: Keep the receipt or order details
summary.zh-Hans: 保留收据或订单信息

text.en: Keep the receipt or order details.
text.zh-Hans: 保留收据或订单详情。

summary.en: Be ready to explain exactly what was misleading
summary.zh-Hans: 准备好明确说明哪里具有误导性

text.en: Be ready to explain exactly what was misleading.
text.zh-Hans: 准备好准确说明，哪一部分让您觉得具有误导性。

summary.en: Decide whether you want a refund or replacement
summary.zh-Hans: 先决定自己想要退款还是更换

text.en: Decide whether you want a refund or replacement before contacting the seller.
text.zh-Hans: 在联系卖家之前，先想清楚您想要退款还是更换。

summary.en: Relevant evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 相关证据

default.en: Gather the receipt, product photos, labels, packaging, and any shop sign or website description.
default.zh-Hans: 收集收据、商品照片、标签、包装，以及任何店内标识或网站描述。

misleading_product.en: Gather the receipt, product photos, labels, packaging, and any shop sign or website description.
misleading_product.zh-Hans: 收集收据、商品照片、标签、包装，以及任何店内标识或网站描述。

summary.en: Seller
summary.zh-Hans: 卖家

text.en: Seller
text.zh-Hans: 卖家

summary.en: Consumer complaint service
summary.zh-Hans: 消费者投诉服务

text.en: Consumer complaint service
text.zh-Hans: 消费者投诉服务

resultTitle.en: This looks like an unresolved seller dispute.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 这看起来像是卖家纠纷尚未解决。

resultSummary.en: You have already contacted the seller, but the issue is still not moving forward.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 您已经联系过卖家，但事情仍然没有推进。

summary.en: Do not keep repeating the same conversation
summary.zh-Hans: 不要反复进行同样的对话

text.en: Do not keep repeating the same conversation without new evidence or a clearer request.
text.zh-Hans: 如果没有新的证据或更明确的诉求，不要一遍又一遍重复同样的沟通。

summary.en: Put all your documents and messages in one place
summary.zh-Hans: 把所有文件和聊天记录整理到一起

text.en: Put all your documents and messages in one place.
text.zh-Hans: 把所有文件和聊天记录整理到一个地方。

summary.en: Write one short summary of the problem
summary.zh-Hans: 写一段简短的问题概述

text.en: Write one short summary of the problem.
text.zh-Hans: 用简短的话写下问题概述。

summary.en: Decide exactly what you want before contacting the seller again
summary.zh-Hans: 再次联系卖家前先明确自己想要什么

text.en: Decide exactly what you want before contacting the seller again.
text.zh-Hans: 再次联系卖家之前，先明确自己想要什么结果。

summary.en: Save every reply, refusal, or promise
summary.zh-Hans: 保存每一次回复、拒绝或承诺

text.en: Save every reply, refusal, or promise.
text.zh-Hans: 保存对方的每一次回复、拒绝或承诺。

summary.en: Relevant evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 相关证据

default.en: Gather the receipt, photos, chat history, emails, and a note of what the seller has already said.
default.zh-Hans: 收集收据、照片、聊天记录、邮件，以及卖家已作出回应的记录。

seller_unresolved.en: Gather the receipt, photos, chat history, emails, and a note of what the seller has already said.
seller_unresolved.zh-Hans: 收集收据、照片、聊天记录、邮件，以及卖家已作出回应的记录。

summary.en: Seller
summary.zh-Hans: 卖家

text.en: Seller
text.zh-Hans: 卖家

summary.en: Consumer complaint service
summary.zh-Hans: 消费者投诉服务

text.en: Consumer complaint service
text.zh-Hans: 消费者投诉服务

resultTitle.en: This looks like a rental bond or cleaning fee dispute.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 这看起来像是租房押金或清洁费用纠纷。

resultSummary.en: Part of your bond may have been deducted for cleaning, damage, or property condition reasons.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 您的押金可能因为清洁、损坏或房屋状况问题被扣掉了一部分。

summary.en: Read the deduction notice carefully
summary.zh-Hans: 仔细阅读扣款通知

text.en: Read the deduction notice carefully.
text.zh-Hans: 仔细阅读扣款通知。

summary.en: Check your tenancy agreement and move-out evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 查看租约和退租时的证据

text.en: Check your tenancy agreement and move-out evidence.
text.zh-Hans: 查看您的租约以及退租时保存的证据。

summary.en: Compare the claim with your own photos, receipts, and messages
summary.zh-Hans: 将对方说法与自己的照片、收据和消息记录进行对比

text.en: Compare the claim with your own photos, cleaning receipts, and messages.
text.zh-Hans: 将对方的扣款理由与您自己的照片、清洁收据和消息记录进行对比。

summary.en: Be ready to contact the landlord or agent in writing
summary.zh-Hans: 准备好以书面形式联系房东或中介

text.en: Be ready to contact the landlord or agent in writing.
text.zh-Hans: 准备好以书面形式联系房东或中介。

summary.en: Be clear about which part of the deduction you disagree with
summary.zh-Hans: 明确自己不同意哪一部分扣款

text.en: Be clear about which part of the deduction you disagree with and why.
text.zh-Hans: 明确指出您不同意哪一部分扣款，以及原因是什么。

summary.en: Relevant evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 相关证据

default.en: Gather the tenancy agreement, move-out photos or videos, cleaning receipts, messages, and the bond deduction notice.
default.zh-Hans: 收集租约、退租照片或视频、清洁收据、聊天记录，以及押金扣款通知。

rental_bond.en: Gather the tenancy agreement, move-out photos or videos, cleaning receipts, messages, and the bond deduction notice.
rental_bond.zh-Hans: 收集租约、退租照片或视频、清洁收据、聊天记录，以及押金扣款通知。

summary.en: Landlord or agent
summary.zh-Hans: 房东或中介

text.en: Landlord or agent
text.zh-Hans: 房东或中介

summary.en: Tenancy complaint service
summary.zh-Hans: 租务投诉服务

text.en: Tenancy complaint service
text.zh-Hans: 租务投诉服务

resultTitle.en: You are not sure which type of dispute this is.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 您目前还不确定这属于哪一类纠纷。

resultSummary.en: That is okay. Start by organising the facts and evidence first.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 没关系，先把事实和证据整理清楚。

summary.en: Gather your key documents, messages, receipts, and screenshots
summary.zh-Hans: 收集关键文件、聊天记录、收据和截图

text.en: Gather your key documents, messages, receipts, and screenshots.
text.zh-Hans: 收集关键文件、聊天记录、收据和截图。

summary.en: Write one short summary of what happened
summary.zh-Hans: 写一段简短的事情经过

text.en: Write one short summary of what happened.
text.zh-Hans: 简要写下事情经过。

summary.en: Try to work out which type of issue this is
summary.zh-Hans: 先判断这更像哪一类问题

text.en: Try to work out whether this is about misleading information, an unresolved seller issue, or a rental bond deduction.
text.zh-Hans: 尝试判断这是误导性信息、卖家纠纷未解决，还是押金扣款问题。

summary.en: Keep everything in writing as much as possible
summary.zh-Hans: 尽量把所有沟通都留成书面记录

text.en: Keep everything in writing as much as possible.
text.zh-Hans: 尽量把所有沟通都留成书面记录。

summary.en: Relevant evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 相关证据

default.en: Gather any receipts, screenshots, messages, notices, photos, or contracts you still have.
default.zh-Hans: 收集您目前还保留的任何收据、截图、消息、通知、照片或合同。

not_sure.en: Gather any receipts, screenshots, messages, notices, photos, or contracts you still have.
not_sure.zh-Hans: 收集您目前还保留的任何收据、截图、消息、通知、照片或合同。

summary.en: Relevant complaint service
summary.zh-Hans: 相关投诉渠道

resultTitle.zh-Hans: 先提出一次明确的书面请求。

resultSummary.en: You have not made a clear written request yet.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 您还没有提出过一次明确的书面请求。

summary.en: Put your evidence together first
summary.zh-Hans: 先把证据整理好

default.en: Put your key documents and screenshots in one place.
default.zh-Hans: 把关键文件和截图整理到一个地方。

misleading_product.en: Gather the receipt, product photos, labels, packaging, and any shop sign or website description.
misleading_product.zh-Hans: 收集收据、商品照片、标签、包装，以及任何店内标识或网站描述。

seller_unresolved.en: Gather the receipt, photos, chat history, emails, and a note of what the seller has already said.
seller_unresolved.zh-Hans: 收集收据、照片、聊天记录、邮件，以及卖家已作出回应的记录。

rental_bond.en: Gather the tenancy agreement, move-out photos or videos, cleaning receipts, messages, and the bond deduction notice.
rental_bond.zh-Hans: 收集租约、退租照片或视频、清洁收据、聊天记录，以及押金扣款通知。

not_sure.en: Gather any receipts, screenshots, messages, notices, photos, or contracts you still have.
not_sure.zh-Hans: 收集您目前还保留的任何收据、截图、消息、通知、照片或合同。

summary.en: Decide exactly what you want before contacting them
summary.zh-Hans: 联系前先明确自己想要什么

text.en: Decide exactly what you want before contacting them.
text.zh-Hans: 联系对方之前，先明确自己想要什么结果。

summary.en: Make one clear written contact
summary.zh-Hans: 发出一次清晰明确的书面联系

default.en: Make one clear written contact instead of starting with repeated back-and-forth discussion.
default.zh-Hans: 不要一开始就反复来回沟通，先发出一次清晰明确的书面联系。

misleading_product.en: Contact the seller clearly and explain what was misleading. Ask for a refund or replacement.
misleading_product.zh-Hans: 清楚联系卖家，说明哪里具有误导性，并提出退款或更换要求。

seller_unresolved.en: Send one clear follow-up message to the seller and state exactly what you want.
seller_unresolved.zh-Hans: 给卖家发送一次明确的跟进消息，清楚说明您的诉求。

rental_bond.en: Contact the landlord or agent in writing and explain which part of the deduction you disagree with and why.
rental_bond.zh-Hans: 以书面形式联系房东或中介，说明您不同意哪一部分扣款，以及原因。

not_sure.en: Contact the other side in writing and explain the issue as clearly as you can.
not_sure.zh-Hans: 以书面形式联系对方，尽可能清楚地说明问题。

summary.en: Your main evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 主要证据

text.en: Your main evidence
text.zh-Hans: 主要证据

summary.en: Seller, landlord, or agent
summary.zh-Hans: 卖家、房东或中介

text.en: Seller, landlord, or agent
text.zh-Hans: 卖家、房东或中介

resultTitle.en: You may still need one clear follow-up.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 你可能还需要进行一次明确的跟进。

resultSummary.en: You contacted them once, but you still do not have a clear answer.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你已经联系过一次，但仍然没有得到明确答复。

summary.en: Do not keep repeating the same argument
summary.zh-Hans: 不要反复重复同样的说法

text.en: Do not keep repeating the same argument without changing anything.
text.zh-Hans: 如果没有新增内容，就不要反复重复同样的说法。

summary.en: Send one clear follow-up message
summary.zh-Hans: 发送一次清晰明确的跟进消息

text.en: Send one clear follow-up message and ask for a clear written response.
text.zh-Hans: 发送一次清晰明确的跟进消息，并要求对方给出书面明确回复。

summary.en: Save any reply, refusal, or promise
summary.zh-Hans: 保存任何回复、拒绝或承诺

text.en: Save any reply, refusal, or promise.
text.zh-Hans: 保存对方的任何回复、拒绝或承诺。

summary.en: Chat history, emails, or message record
summary.zh-Hans: 聊天记录、邮件或消息记录

text.en: Chat history, emails, or message record
text.zh-Hans: 聊天记录、邮件或消息记录

summary.en: Complaint service
summary.zh-Hans: 投诉服务

default.zh-Hans: 消费者或租务投诉服务

resultTitle.en: This may need the next formal complaint step.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 这件事可能需要进入下一步正式投诉程序。

resultSummary.en: The issue appears to be repeating, unresolved, or clearly refused.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 这个问题似乎反复出现、仍未解决，或已被明确拒绝。

summary.en: Stop repeating the same argument
summary.zh-Hans: 停止重复同样的说法

text.en: Stop repeating the same argument unless you have new evidence.
text.zh-Hans: 除非你有新的证据，否则不要反复重复同样的说法。

summary.en: Ask for a clear written reply
summary.zh-Hans: 要求对方给出明确的书面回复

text.en: Ask for a clear written reply if you do not already have one.
text.zh-Hans: 如果你还没有拿到明确的书面回复，请现在要求对方给出。

summary.en: Prepare your documents and timeline
summary.zh-Hans: 整理文件和时间线

text.en: Prepare your documents and timeline for the next formal complaint step.
text.zh-Hans: 为下一步正式投诉整理好所有文件和时间线。

summary.en: Check the relevant complaint pathway
summary.zh-Hans: 查看对应的投诉途径

template.en: Check the relevant complaint pathway for your type of issue. {help}
template.zh-Hans: 根据你的问题类型查看对应的投诉途径。{help}

misleading_product.en: For consumer disputes, contact the consumer complaint service.
misleading_product.zh-Hans: 如果是消费者纠纷，请联系消费者投诉服务。

seller_unresolved.en: For consumer disputes, contact the consumer complaint service.
seller_unresolved.zh-Hans: 如果是消费者纠纷，请联系消费者投诉服务。

rental_bond.en: For tenancy disputes, contact the tenancy complaint service.
rental_bond.zh-Hans: 如果是租务纠纷，请联系租务投诉服务。

summary.en: A short timeline of what happened
summary.zh-Hans: 简短时间线

text.en: A short timeline of what happened
text.zh-Hans: 发生经过的简短时间线

summary.en: All messages, receipts, notices, and supporting evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 所有消息、收据、通知和支持性证据

text.en: All messages, receipts, notices, and supporting evidence
text.zh-Hans: 所有消息、收据、通知和支持性证据

summary.en: Complaint service
summary.zh-Hans: 投诉服务

resultTitle.en: Save and organise your evidence now.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 现在就把证据保存并整理好。

resultSummary.en: Some of your key records may still need to be gathered or protected.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你的一些关键记录可能还需要继续收集或妥善保存。

summary.en: Save screenshots, receipts, notices, and messages
summary.zh-Hans: 保存截图、收据、通知和消息

text.en: Save screenshots, receipts, notices, and messages before anything is deleted or lost.
text.zh-Hans: 在任何内容被删除或丢失之前，先保存截图、收据、通知和消息。

summary.en: Put everything in one place
summary.zh-Hans: 把所有材料整理到一起

text.en: Put everything in one place.
text.zh-Hans: 把所有材料整理到一个地方。

summary.en: Write down the key dates and what happened
summary.zh-Hans: 记录关键日期和经过

text.en: Write down the key dates, what happened, and what the other side has already said.
text.zh-Hans: 写下关键日期、发生了什么，以及对方已经说过什么。

summary.en: Relevant evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 相关证据

default.en: Put your key documents and screenshots in one place.
default.zh-Hans: 把关键文件和截图整理到一个地方。

misleading_product.en: Gather the receipt, product photos, labels, packaging, and any shop sign or website description.
misleading_product.zh-Hans: 收集收据、商品照片、标签、包装，以及任何店内标识或网站描述。

seller_unresolved.en: Gather the receipt, photos, chat history, emails, and a note of what the seller has already said.
seller_unresolved.zh-Hans: 收集收据、照片、聊天记录、邮件，以及卖家已作出回应的记录。

rental_bond.en: Gather the tenancy agreement, move-out photos or videos, cleaning receipts, messages, and the bond deduction notice.
rental_bond.zh-Hans: 收集租约、退租照片或视频、清洁收据、聊天记录，以及押金扣款通知。

not_sure.en: Gather any receipts, screenshots, messages, notices, photos, or contracts you still have.
not_sure.zh-Hans: 收集您目前还保留的任何收据、截图、消息、通知、照片或合同。

summary.zh-Hans: 投诉服务
